name: Cranberry-Lemon Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water and sugar to boiling, stirring constantly until sugar is dissolved; allow to cool.
2. Prepare the tea by steeping 2 teaspoons loose tea or 2 tea bags in 1 cup of boiling water; let it cool.
3. Refrigerate all ingredients.
4. Just before serving, mix everything in a large punch bowl.
5. To make an ice ring, arrange thin citrus slices and cranberries in a 6-cup ring mold. Pour water into the mold to partially cover the fruit. Freeze.
6. When frozen, add more water to fill the mold about 3/4 full. Freeze again.
7. Unmold and float the fruit side up in the punch bowl.
8. Makes about 30 servings, each being approximately 1/2 cup.
